series_metadata.series_description: Record includes financial reports required by the federal government (Department of Health and Human Services)administering ODM federal programs. The supporting documentation contain expenditure statistical data by program compiled from ODM, CDJFS''s and sister state agencies. Files include backup documentation, worksheets and related correspondence.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: superseded, obsolete or replaced ; Paper: in office and 8 years in records center. Send State Archives storage
